title: Down with the Sickness
why_this_song: Down with the Sickness by Disturbed (2000) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Come on get down with the sickness
Come on get down with the sickness
Madness is the gift, that has been given to me
It seems what's left of my human side

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sickness" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sickness" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Come on get down with the sickness
No mommy, don't do it again

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Down with the Sickness" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Down with the Sickness", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Down with the Sickness" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Down with the Sickness" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Down with the Sickness", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Down with the Sickness", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
